name: campus-connect
description: Campus Connect — CUEA Student Engagement Platform (Monorepo)

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BACKEND,STUDENT,ADMIN" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:student" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:student && npm run install:admin
